collections.title: Knowledge Graph Cache
collections.description: Local cache of entities sent to the external Forage Graph API (forage-graph-production.up.railway.app). One key per entity. Builds silently across every run.

collections.title: Active MCP Sessions
collections.description: One entry per connected AI agent SSE session. Tracks session lifecycle, tool calls made, and total charges in the run.

collections.title: Response Cache
collections.description: Short-lived cache of tool results (Jina scrapes, SerpAPI searches) to avoid duplicate API calls within a run. TTL: 5 minutes.

collections.title: Tool Usage Statistics
collections.description: Aggregated call counts and revenue per tool, updated after each run. Used to monitor what agents actually use most.

collections.title: Run Summaries
collections.description: One entry per actor run. Summarises which tools were called, total revenue, errors, and graph nodes created.

collections.title: Actor Input
collections.description: The input provided when starting the actor run (transport mode, port, env config).
